cancel.title: Cancel quote request
cancel.description: The request will be marked as cancelled and the vendor will receive a notification. The associated quote is not modified. This action cannot be undone.
cancel.success: Request cancelled. The vendor has been notified.

errors.QR_NOT_FOUND: We could not find this request or it is no longer available.
errors.QR_NOT_CANCELLABLE: This request can no longer be cancelled in its current state.
errors.QR_HAS_CONFIRMED_BOOKING: Cancellation is not possible: a confirmed booking intent is associated. Cancel the booking first.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: You need to sign in to cancel the request.
errors.FORBIDDEN: Your role cannot cancel quote requests.
errors.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

page.title: Compare quotes
page.subtitle: Review the quotes received for this category and decide which to mark as preferred.

empty.title: You have not received quotes in this category yet
empty.description: As vendors respond to your requests, quotes will appear here for comparison.

table.caption: Quotes received in the {category} category
table.ratingAria: Average rating {rating} out of 5, with {reviews} reviews

errors.INVALID_FILTERS: Select a category to compare quotes.
errors.INVALID_CATEGORY: The selected category is not available.
errors.AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED: You need to sign in to view the comparator.
errors.EVENT_NOT_FOUND: We could not find that event or you do not have permission to view it.
errors.UNEXPECTED: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
